pom.xml.general_idea: Add JaCoCo version property for code coverage configuration.
Add SpringDoc OpenAPI dependency for API documentation.
Add H2 database dependency for embedded development database.
Add Spring Boot Data Redis dependency for distributed caching/pub-sub.
Add Spring Boot Actuator dependency for metrics and monitoring.
Add JaCoCo Maven plugin for code coverage reporting.
Add Maven Failsafe plugin for integration testing.
Add OWASP Dependency Check plugin for security vulnerability scanning.
Add SpotBugs plugin for static code analysis.
Add Maven profile for integration tests with Spring Boot start/stop goals.
